anvilcraft.ponder.anvil.text_1: The anvil is the foundation for all processing in the AnvilCraft
anvilcraft.ponder.anvil.text_2: The anvil falls from a height to complete one anvil process.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_comparator.text_: When the blocks on either side of the comparator are the same, it’ll send out a signal.
Right-click to turn on precise mode—it’ll check super carefully if the blocks are exactly the same.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_placer.text_1: Block Placer can place blocks in front of it when powered by redstone.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_placer.text_2: It can also read the items in the container.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_placer.text_3: If the block placer is blocked by a mob, it will not place the block.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_placer_anvil.tex: Block Placer can place blocks with anvil.
The higher the anvil falls, the farther the blocks are placed. The farthest is 5 grids.
When the placer is followed by another placer, they can share containers.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_process.text_1: When the anvil hits the spawner, it will be forced to work. But there are still constraints, such as light, number of mob.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_process.text_2: The higher the height of the anvil, the higher the probability of success.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_process.text_3: When the anvil strikes the red stone, a red stone EMP occurs, extinguishing the nearby red stone torches for an instant.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_process.text_4: The higher the anvil falls, the larger the range.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_process.text_5: Press the lead into the vault to reset it.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_recipe.text_1: When the anvil hits a specific block, the block is crushed.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_recipe.text_2: When the anvil hits the block with an item on it, press the item into the block.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_recipe.text_3: When the anvil hit the block on the stone cutter, the block was destroyed.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_recipe.text_4: The Royal Anvil can precisely destroy blocks.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_recipe.text_5: The Ember Anvil can melt blocks.
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_basics.text_1: A normal funnel can only transmit one item at a time
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_basics.text_2: Whereas chutes can transfer a set of items at once
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_basics.text_3: and can be thrown as drops
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_basics.text_4: When the chute output position is blocked by a block, the item will stop outputting
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_basics.text_5: When there is an identical set of drops under the chute, the item will not continue to be thrown
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_filtering.text_1: Right-click the chute to open the filter settings interface
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_filtering.text_2: Set it allow only diamonds to pass through
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_filtering.text_3: The chute will only let the set item pass through and will not absorb items outside of the filter condition
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.header: Use heater to execute the high-heat recipe
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.text_1: When placing down the heater, it will not work if there is no valid power grid nearby or if the grid is already overloaded.
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.text_2: It requires 16 kW of power to operate.
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.text_3: Assuming we are now connected to a valid power grid...
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.text_4: The heater is now working properly.
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.text_5: Place a cauldron on the heater
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.text_6: Drop some raw minerals into the cauldron...
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.text_7: Use an anvil or the Anvil Hammer to strike the cauldron.
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.text_8: It will execute the high-heat recipe
anvilcraft.ponder.impact_pile.header: Use Impact Pile to generate Mineral Fountain.
anvilcraft.ponder.impact_pile.text_1: Impact piles are consumables used to create a mineral fountain.
anvilcraft.ponder.impact_pile.text_2: To work properly, it must be placed no higher than 8 blocks above the world’s bottom.
anvilcraft.ponder.impact_pile.text_3: And it must be placed on bedrock or deepslate.
anvilcraft.ponder.impact_pile.text_4: Then strike it with an undamaged anvil dropped from at least 20 blocks high.
anvilcraft.ponder.impact_pile.text_5: When the conditions are met, the anvil and the impact pile will be consumed...
anvilcraft.ponder.impact_pile.text_6: and a mineral fountain will be generated.
anvilcraft.ponder.iron_trapdoor.header: Use Iron Trapdoor to trigger unpack Recipe
anvilcraft.ponder.iron_trapdoor.text_1: You can use the iron trapdoor to disassemble composite items into their components.
anvilcraft.ponder.magnet.header: Use magnet to attract the anvil
anvilcraft.ponder.magnet.text_1: The anvil needs to be lifted and fallen for processing
anvilcraft.ponder.magnet.text_3: Magnet will stop working when it receives a redstone signal.
anvilcraft.ponder.magnet_magnetize_ingot: Get a magnet ingot through a hollow magnet block
A player throws a iron ingot at a time.
Iron ingots have a probability of being magnetized.
anvilcraft.ponder.magnet_power_generatio: Generate electricity by rubbing a magnet and a copper block
When a magnet is pushed against adjacent copper blocks, it generates electric charges.
Use a collector to absorb the electric charges on the magnet.
Copper rust can affect the production of electric charges.
A normal chute drops items directly downward
Magnetic chutes attract items from behind and propel them forward
When items are ejected, they're given forward momentum
anvilcraft.ponder.magnetic_chute_connect: Regular chutes still transform into simple chutes when connected to magnetic chutes
But magnetic chutes don't transform into simple chutes when connected to other magnetic chutes
anvilcraft.ponder.magnetic_chute_filteri: Right-click the magnetic chute to open the filter settings interface
Set it to allow only diamonds to pass through
The magnetic chute will only let the set item pass through and will not absorb items outside of the filter condition
anvilcraft.ponder.simple_chute.text_1: When one chute is connected to the output direction of another chute, it becomes a simple chute
anvilcraft.ponder.simple_chute.text_2: The simple chute can receive items from other chutes from multiple directions
anvilcraft.ponder.simple_chute.text_3: Normal chutes are locked by redstone signals
anvilcraft.ponder.simple_chute.text_4: The simple chute will not be locked by the redstone signal
anvilcraft.ponder.sliding_rail_blocks.te: Blocks can also slide on sliding rails when pushed by pistons
However, blocks that cannot be pushed by pistons also cannot slide on rails
anvilcraft.ponder.sliding_rail_items.tex: Sliding rails have extremely smooth surfaces that allow items to slide without friction
Items can slide infinitely far until they reach the end of the rail or are collected
anvilcraft.ponder.sliding_rail_multi_blo: Sliding rails can handle multiple blocks
Slime blocks can stick multiple blocks together to form a sliding structure
The entire multi-block structure slides together along the rails
anvilcraft.ponder.space_overcompressor.h: Use the Space Overcompressor to create the Neutronium Ingot
anvilcraft.ponder.space_overcompressor.t: Press a large amount of metal items into the Space Overcompressor to accumulate mass.
When the Space Overcompressor has built up enough mass, a neutron ingot will form. It can pass through most blocks, so you'll need something like end dust to stop it.
anvilcraft.ponder.tag.logistics_componen: Various item transfer and storage components
anvilcraft.ponder.tag.magnet_block.descr: Use magnet to attract the anvil
anvilcraft.ponder.transmission_pole.head: Use Transmission Pole to transmitting electricity

enchantment.anvilcraft.beheading.desc: 增加凋零骷髅头颅的掉落率，使其它生物能掉落头颅。
enchantment.anvilcraft.felling.desc: 连锁采集日志及其变种，连锁数量上限随等级增加。
enchantment.anvilcraft.harvest.desc: 收割一定范围内的成熟作物并重新种植，范围随等级增加。
enchantment.anvilcraft.smelting.desc: 熔炼方块掉落物（在丝绸之触和欧气附加之后生效），附魔等级越高双倍矿物产出的概率越高
entity.anvilcraft.thrown_ember_metal_hea: 掷出的鱼筋金属很重的鱼叉
entity.anvilcraft.thrown_frost_metal_hea: 掷出的冻手很重的鱼叉

gui.anvilcraft.category.end_portal_conve: 落入末地传送门时发生转化
gui.anvilcraft.category.mass_inject.mass: 当注入的质量值达到%s后，产出一个此物品
gui.anvilcraft.category.mob_transform: 『MADE IN HEAVEN』光柱内的生物转化
gui.anvilcraft.category.void_decay.rando: 接收到随机刻时，中心方块将被转化

jei.anvilcraft.info.capacitor: 通过在收费者中给空电容充电获取
jei.anvilcraft.info.craw_claw: 从放置在贴吧中的屑笼中获取
jei.anvilcraft.info.end_dust: 任意重力方块（铁砧、龙蛋除外）落入末地传送门时，会转化为末地尘。
jei.anvilcraft.info.geode_1: 右键使用时能够找到附近的紫晶洞（地物）
jei.anvilcraft.info.geode_2: 通过挖掘紫水晶母岩掉落
jei.anvilcraft.info.geode_3: 也可以在奖励箱中找到它
jei.anvilcraft.info.geode_4: 或是从珠宝商那里交易获取
jei.anvilcraft.info.mob_transform_with_i: 使用其持物生物转化配方中对应的物品右键点击生物可以强制该生物手持该物品。
jei.anvilcraft.info.royal_steel_upgrade_: 可以在村庄武器匠小屋的胸部中找到它
或者与珠宝商交易来获取

tooltip.anvilcraft.heat.title: 热能信息：
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.amulet_box.line_: 右键收纳物品栏中的安全用一次性物品，Shift + 右键取出图腾；
手持时在需要的时候消耗盒中的图腾，消耗图腾后可能得到神秘礼物。
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.anvil_hammer: 是锤子、是哐当、是扳手、是护目镜、也是咚咚锤
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.batch_crafter: 收到雷石东信号一次合成所有内部的物品，耗电功率为 4 kW
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.block_devourer:
受到雷石东激活时：
    吞噬前方 3 x 3 范围方块
被哐当砸时（按下落距离）：
    1 格 -> 5 x 5
    2 格 -> 7 x 7
没有存储空间，会将物品输入进背后的方块/实体物品栏或在背后生成掉落物
MC石头、土块、尼德兰岩、硬奶酪等世界基本方块不会 100% 掉落
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.block_placer:
受到雷石东激活在面前放置方块，被哐当砸到将方块放置在更远的位置。
没有存储空间，需要从背后的方块/掉落物/实体物品栏中取物品
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.brass_pressure_p: 根据上方玩家物品栏填满的程度输出雷石东信号，同时也是黄铜板
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.bronze_pressure_: 根据上方玩家饱食度输出红石信号，同时也是青铜板
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.charged_neutroni: 不再穿过方块，储存了大量电能
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.copper_pressure_: 随按压时间增加雷石东信号，同时也是铜板
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.crab_trap: 放置在水中帮你捕捞水产品
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.disk.clear: Shift + 右键清除存储的数据
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.ember_anvil_hamm: 是锤子、是哐当、是扳手、是护目镜、也是咚咚锤
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.ember_glass: Wither proof, No tools required on collect
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.exposed_copper_p: 随按压时间增加雷石东信号，同时也是铜板
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.ferrite_core_mag: 吸引下方的哐当，被↑↓推拉时使相邻的铜方块产生电荷
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.geode: 使用时寻找周围的紫晶洞（地物）
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.heater: 加热上方的方块，耗电功率为 16 kW
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.heliostats:
手持追光者右键下界玄素方块或钨块决定照射点
放置后在白天加热照射的方块
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.hollow_magnet_bl: 吸引下方的哐当，被↑↓推拉时使相邻的铜方块产生电荷
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.induction_light:
照明，耗电功率为 1 kW
使用红石粉右键该方块将其改为催熟模式
使用萤石粉右键该方块将其改为防刷怪模式
使用虚空物质右键该方块将其改为防刷动物模式
以上三种模式耗电功率变为 16 kW
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.ionocraft: 放在电网中会让你飞起来！
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.ionocraft_backpa:
装备时可创造飞行
需要有电网供电或物品栏中有电容器才能正常使用
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.item_collector: 根据收集范围和间隔情况调整功耗，耗电功率范围为30 kW ~ 150 kW
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.lead_pressure_pl: 根据上方生物种类数量输出雷石东信号，同时也是铅板
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.magnet_block: 吸引下方的哐当，被↑↓推拉时使相邻的铜方块产生电荷
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.negative_matter: 负物质不是反物质，是反重力物质
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.negative_matter_: 负物质不是反物质，是反重力物质
负物质不是反物质，是反重力物质
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.neutronium_ingot: 会穿过大部分方块，但会被末地尘、负物质块和基岩挡住
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.oxidized_copper_: 随按压时间增加雷石东信号，同时也是铜板
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.plutonium_pressu: 根据上方玩家手持物品耐久度输出雷石东信号，同时也是钚阿姨压一压板
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.power_converter_: 将能量转换为 FE，耗能 36 kW
将能量转换为 FE，耗能 6 kW
将电能转化为FE/RF/AE，耗电功率为 1 kW
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.remote_transmiss: 组建电网，传输距离为 16 个方块（据传上古时期有大能可以用其击碎硬♂硬的东西）
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.resin_block: 对友好生物或虚弱的怪物使用以抓捕生物
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.royal_anvil: 不毁且有强大的兼容性
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.royal_anvil_hamm: 是锤子、是哐当、是扳手、是护目镜、也是咚咚锤
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.silver_pressure_: 根据上方亡灵生物的数量输出雷石东信号，同时也是银板
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.structure_tool.i: 输入与输出的多方块结构的大小必须相同
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.structure_tool.l: 右键为多方块配方选择区域
区域中的方块将作为配方的输入
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.structure_tool.m: 选择的区域必须是一个正方体
选择的区域边长必须为单数且不能超过15
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.tesla_tower: 电击8格范围以内的生物或  雷  霆  法  杖  ，耗电功率 128 kW
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.tin_can: 锡罐可与食物合成得到罐装食品
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.tin_pressure_pla: 根据上方生物中最低的血量百分比输出雷石东信号，同时也是锡板
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.titanium_pressur: 根据上方物品中最高的耐久输出雷石东信号，同时也是钛板
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.transcendence_an: 是锤子、是哐当、是扳手、是护目镜、也是咚咚锤
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.transmission_pol: 组建电网，传输距离为 8 个方块（据传上古时期有大能可以用其击碎硬♂硬的东西）
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.tungsten_pressur: 根据上方防火实体的数量输出雷石东信号，同时也是钨板
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.uranium_pressure: 根据上方物品中最低的耐久输出雷石东信号，同时也是铀板
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.weathered_copper: 随按压时间增加雷石东信号，同时也是铜板
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.zinc_pressure_pl: 根据上方生物中最高的血量百分比输出雷石东信号，同时也是锌板
tooltip.anvilcraft.property.eternal: 永恒：无法破坏，免疫火焰、爆炸、仙人掌，甚至时间和虚空
tooltip.anvilcraft.property.fire_reforgi: 重铸：在火或熔岩中自动修复
tooltip.anvilcraft.property.merciless: 无情：禁用除特定魔咒外的所有魔咒 [按住 %s 查看] 并将其转换为攻击伤害和挖掘效率
tooltip.anvilcraft.property.merciless.sh: 无情：禁用除特定魔咒外的所有魔咒（%s）并将其转换为攻击伤害和挖掘效率
tooltip.anvilcraft.property.multiphase: 多相：按 [%s] 键切换相位
tooltip.anvilcraft.property.providence: 强运：有概率多次触发 [按住 %s 查看] 附魔
tooltip.anvilcraft.property.providence.s: 强运：有概率多次触发（%s）附魔
